_comment: parser-worker — CSC demo parser → fragg-3.0 stats ingest. Import this file into the Pterodactyl panel: Nests → (your nest) → Import Egg.
name: Parser Worker
author: admin@example.com
description: Polls the CSC core GraphQL API for completed matches in a configured season, downloads each demo archive (.zip or .7z, sniffed by magic bytes), parses it via github.com/ethsmith/eco-rating, and posts the resulting player-stats to the fragg-3.0 stats API. Skips matches where either roster belongs to a test franchise (TFR / Test Franchise / TestHomeTeam etc.). Idempotent: re-runs are safe and skip already-ingested matches.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# parser-worker Pterodactyl installer
#
# Runs inside ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian (has bash, git, curl,
# tar, ca-certificates pre-installed). Pulls source from the configured
# Git repo/branch, fetches a Go toolchain, builds a static binary into
# /mnt/server/parser-worker, and cleans up build artifacts.

set -euo pipefail

GIT_ADDRESS="${GIT_ADDRESS:-}"
GIT_BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}"
GO_VERSION="${GO_VERSION:-1.25.0}"

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: GIT_ADDRESS variable is required (set it in the panel)" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "==> Fetching Go ${GO_VERSION}..."
curl -fsSL "https://go.dev/dl/go${GO_VERSION}.linux-amd64.tar.gz" \
  | tar -C /tmp -xz
export PATH="/tmp/go/bin:${PATH}"
go version

cd /mnt/server
rm -rf src

echo "==> Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${GIT_BRANCH})..."
git clone --depth=1 --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_ADDRESS}" src

echo "==> Building parser-worker (static, stripped)..."
cd src
CGO_ENABLED=0 GOTOOLCHAIN=auto \
  go build -trimpath -ldflags="-s -w" \
  -o /mnt/server/parser-worker ./cmd/worker

echo "==> Cleaning up..."
cd /mnt/server
rm -rf src /tmp/go /root/go /root/.cache/go-build 2>/dev/null || true
chmod +x parser-worker

echo "==> Install complete:"
ls -lh /mnt/server/parser-worker

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Public Git URL to clone parser-worker from. e.g. https://github.com/your-user/parser-worker.git

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch (or tag) of parser-worker to build from.

variables.name: Go Toolchain Version
variables.description: Go version downloaded during install (the eco-rating parser requires Go >= 1.25). Format: 1.25.0

variables.name: CSC Season
variables.description: CSC season number to poll for completed matches. Required.

variables.name: Stats API URL
variables.description: Base URL of the fragg-3.0 stats API (no trailing slash). Required.

variables.name: Stats API Key
variables.description: Bearer token matching the stats API's API_KEY env var. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>. Required and sensitive.

variables.name: Match Type
variables.description: Which CSC match type to fetch. Usually Regulation; Combine for combine games; Scrim for scrims.

variables.name: CSC GraphQL URL
variables.description: Override the CSC core GraphQL endpoint. Default works for production CSC.

variables.name: Max Matches Per Run
variables.description: Upper bound on matches processed per pass. Lower = more responsive shutdown; higher = catches up faster on first run. On a dedicated server 50–500 is fine.

variables.name: Check Interval (Minutes)
variables.description: How often the worker polls CSC for new matches. 0 = run one pass and exit (don't use this on Pterodactyl, the panel will just keep restarting). >0 = stay alive and sleep this many minutes between passes.
